user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new task to the task library, so that standard tasks are available for project allocation
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Task Library screen; When I click Add new task, fill in the task name and description and save; Then the new task is created and listed in the library

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to toggle between active and closed tasks, so that I can review tasks by their lifecycle status
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Task Library screen; When I select Active tasks or Closed tasks; Then only tasks matching that status are shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to see each task's name and description, so that I can understand what each task covers
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Task Library screen; When the list loads; Then each row shows the task name and its description

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through the task library, so that I can browse all 31 tasks across multiple pages
acceptance_criteria: Given the task list spans multiple pages; When I use the pagination controls; Then the corresponding page of tasks is displayed
